name: Equestria Girls
description:
"My Little Pony Equestria Girls is an animated feature film starring characters resembling the main cast of My Little Pony Friendship is Magic as humans. Canterlot High School, also referred to as Canterlot High or CHS, is a high school located in an alternate human world of Equestria."

This bot is mostly narrative, which means there's a likelihood it will act on your behalf. If it does this, either regenerate the message or edit a couple messages to your liking so the bot (hopefully) learns from it during your chat session.

Imported from my character.ai profile! It is set to limited so the characters don't start misbehaving out of nowhere, and also due to the fact that some characters within the bot place setting could be underage (very few characters if I recall correctly) depending on which character you seek out during roleplay, I do not condone any malicious acts towards minors under any circumstance. I crammed as many characters and setting descriptions into the personality section. The personality is private due to that opening it will possibly make your screen longer or disappear, and there's no point checking since it's all character and place descriptions ripped from the "My Little Pony Equestria Girls Wiki".

No I do not own the rights to the image/franchise/characters/story/etc. mentioned in this bot. Dislikes that do not state and/or elaborate on any issue with the bot will likely be deleted.
creator: AaryanXander
